description_long: This object is a modern Oppo smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large touchscreen display with a thin bezel, showing a digital clock, date, and several app icons, indicating it is powered on. The back is glossy black with a single camera lens and flash in the top left corner, and the 'oppo' brand logo centered in white. The sides are slim and appear to be made of metal or plastic, with visible physical buttons for power and volume control. The device is compact, lightweight, and designed for handheld use, typical of contemporary mobile phones. Its overall appearance is minimalist and professional, suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek Oppo smartphone with a large touchscreen, glossy black back, and a single rear camera. The device features a minimalist design with visible side buttons and a centered brand logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large touchscreen display with app icons, clock, and navigation buttons below the screen.
description_view_1: Left side profile revealing the slimness of the phone and a single button near the center.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the glossy black surface, single camera with flash in the top left, and the white 'oppo' logo centered.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the slim edge and two buttons, likely for volume and power control.
attribute_brand_logo: White 'oppo' text logo centered on the back of the device, contrasting against the glossy black surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a digital clock (12:31 AM), date (Thu, Jan. 21), Google search bar, and several app icons including phone, messaging, camera, and settings, with a blue gradient wallpaper.
attribute_camera_placement: Single camera lens with flash located in the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Three physical buttons: two on the right edge (likely volume rocker and power button) and one on the left edge (possibly SIM tray or additional function).
